# Acceptance / Test Plan Template

Use this artifact before sprint execution starts and treat it as the validation handoff for Case.

## Purpose
- Define how the sprint will be validated.
- Keep acceptance expectations explicit before implementation begins.
- Stay lightweight; do not restate the full PRD.

- PRD:
- JTBD / User Stories:
- Technical Implementation Plan:
- Sprint Spec:
